scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.test: node --test src/lib/scan/mockScanService.test.ts src/lib/reportsArchiveUtils.test.ts src/lib/reportVersionState.test.ts server/assetStore.test.js server/assetsApi.test.js server/scanDebugStore.test.js server/scanProviders/normalizeExtractDocMulti.test.js server/scanProviders/tencentExtractDocMulti.test.js
